calendar.matters:
Disabled Adult'S Compromise Claim Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of an Adult Person with a disability hearing this day. Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Linda Chavez.
Atty. Paul Vaillancourt, appearing for the Petitioner Frances Hoppmann. An order waiving live testimony has been filed on July 25, 2006. On the basis of evidence received, the Petition was granted and compromise is approved. The Court approves the distribution agreement allocating all lawsuit proceeds to the wrongful death cause of action with a total of $1,000.00 of net settlement proceeds allocated to Robert Bradley Hoppmann with no deduction of costs and attorney's fees. Said distribution agreement shall apply to all future settlements without the necessity of further order of the court. Order signed in open court.
